use_cases: Trigger form submissions with primary button styling
Navigate between pages in pagination controls
Open dialogs or modals with variant-specific button styles
Toggle UI element states with ghost and outline variants
Execute destructive actions like delete with destructive variant
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority (CVA), offering multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and size options. Uses Tailwind CSS with cn utility for styling, includes focus-visible accessibility rings and disabled state handling. Designed as a reusable atomic component suitable for pagination interfaces and general UI interactions across SaaS, e-commerce, and dev-tool applications.
